title: JOIN PDX - 211info
text: JOIN JOIN PDX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a daytime drop-in center. Services include access to showers, bathrooms, mail pick up and PO Box setup, hygiene items, diapers, pet food, on-site WiFi and telephone usage, and specialized information and referral. 1435 NE 81st Avenue Suite 100 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted with priority given to homeless individuals or families Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday 9am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm. Closed on national holidays. Email (503) 232-2031 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 232-2031 Main phone (503) 232-7052 Administration (503) 232-4640 FAX Main phone (503) 232-2031 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID for mail services LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Portland and Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 72, 77, and MAX stop at 82nd Avenue Services: Diapers Homeless Drop In Centers Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Internet Access Sites Public Restrooms Public Showers/Baths Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Telephone Facilities Temporary Mailing Address Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - JOIN DONATIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOIN
